digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PdfFileSignature, bind a PDF, set a certificate, add a visible digital signature to page 1, and save the signed document.

add-second-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add a Second Digital Signature to a PDF Page
add-second-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a second digital signature on page three of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, including optional visual appearance settings.

sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Custom Appearance (Foreground Image & Background Color)
sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to configure a SignatureCustomAppearance with a foreground image and background color, then apply a PKCS#1 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-suppress-signature-text.title: Sign PDF and Suppress Signature Text
sign-pdf-suppress-signature-text.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and hide the default location, reason, and contact information by setting those properties to empty strings before signing.

sign-pdf-french-caption.title: Sign PDF with French Caption Using SignatureCustomAppearance
sign-pdf-french-caption.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF and set the signature appearance caption to French by configuring the SignatureCustomAppearance locale. The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a visible PKCS#1 signature.

remove-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Signature from PDF
remove-signature-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, remove a signature named 'ApprovalSignature' using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated document.

verify-named-pdf-signature.title: Verify Named PDF Signature Using VerifySigned
verify-named-pdf-signature.description: The example loads a PDF, checks for any digital signatures, searches for a signature named 'ContractSigner', and verifies its validity using the VerifySigned method of PdfFileSignature.

verify-pdf-signature-field.title: Verify PDF Signature Field Using Aspose.Pdf
verify-pdf-signature-field.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding it with PdfFileSignature, and verifying the integrity of a specific digital signature field named "ManagerSignature".

extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, bind it to PdfFileSignature, extract the signing certificate from the 'LegalSignature' field, and save it as a .cer file.

extract-witness-signature-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG
extract-witness-signature-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to extract the image from a PDF signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and convert it to a PNG file.

custom-pdf-signature-appearance-no-capti.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
custom-pdf-signature-appearance-no-capti.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with a visible signature using Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by setting a custom appearance.

sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF document using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

remove-pdf-signature-missing-field.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing-Field Handling
remove-pdf-signature-missing-field.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific digital signature from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, while gracefully handling the case where the signature does not exist.

log-pdf-signature-verification-to-json.title: Log PDF Signature Verification Results to JSON
log-pdf-signature-verification-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to verify digital signatures in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write each signature's name and validation status to a structured JSON file.

sign-and-verify-pdf-using-pdffilesignatu.title: Sign and Verify PDF Using PdfFileSignature
sign-and-verify-pdf-using-pdffilesignatu.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a PKCS#1 certificate using PdfFileSignature and then immediately verify the signature's authenticity.

sign-pdf-with-reason-and-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-and-location.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, setting the signature reason and location before saving the signed document.

add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field on a specific page of a PDF and then digitally sign the document using a certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature Fields
extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the associated X.509 certificate to read the issuer and expiration date.

pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
pdf-signature-report.description: Demonstrates how to read digital signatures from a PDF, verify each signature, and create a new PDF report summarizing the signers and verification results using Aspose.Pdf.

retry-pdf-signing-when-file-locked.title: Retry PDF Signing When File Is Locked
retry-pdf-signing-when-file-locked.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism that handles file‑locking errors caused by another process.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to enumerate and delete every digital signature in a PDF and then save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in a PDF
verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, retrieve all signature names, and verify each signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to extract digital signature images from a PDF and embed them as Base64 images in an HTML report.

sign-pdf-semi-transparent-background.title: Sign PDF with Semi-Transparent Background Appearance
sign-pdf-semi-transparent-background.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and configure a custom signature appearance with a semi‑transparent background color for better readability.

list-signature-names-in-pdf.title: List Signature Names in a PDF
list-signature-names-in-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF document to the PdfFileSignature facade and retrieve the names of all active signatures.

add-image-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Image Signature to PDF
add-image-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF document with a visible image signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature in a console application.

sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.description: Shows how to apply a visible digital signature to the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfFileSignature facade.

locale-specific-pdf-signature.title: Locale‑Specific PDF Signature Appearance
locale-specific-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using a PKCS7 signature and customizing the visual appearance with localized labels for German, Spanish, and Japanese cultures.

remove-signatures-re-sign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with a New Certificate
remove-signatures-re-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to clear all existing signatures from a PDF and apply a new digital signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

check-absence-of-signatures-in-pdf.title: Check for Absence of Signatures in PDF
check-absence-of-signatures-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to confirm that a PDF contains no signatures and that VerifySigned returns false for a non‑existent signature.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to recursively find PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to strip all digital signatures, saving unsigned copies.

extract-signature-certificate-serial-num.title: Extract and Log Signature Certificate Serial Number
extract-signature-certificate-serial-num.description: Shows how to open a PDF, verify it contains digital signatures, retrieve each signature's X.509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

list-pdf-signature-reason-location.title: List PDF Signature Reason and Location
list-pdf-signature-reason-location.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, retrieve all signature names, and extract each signature's reason and location for auditing purposes.

sign-pdf-hidden-signature.title: Sign PDF with Hidden Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-hidden-signature.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while completely hiding the signature appearance, keeping the signature cryptographically valid.
